items.title: Ông lớn đạt 127.300 tỷ doanh thu sau nửa đầu 2026 lắp 2.700 cổng sạc xe điện VinFast
items.summary: Ông lớn đạt 127.300 tỷ doanh thu sau nửa đầu 2026 lắp 2.700 cổng sạc xe điện VinFast nguoiquansat.vn

items.title: 26-year-old quit her corporate job to become a seamstress at Yellowstone National Park for $19.25/hour
items.summary: Zoe De La Paz made her own luck to transition from her corporate engineering job to pursue sewing full-time.

items.title: India's inflation accelerates to 4.38% in June, exceeding forecasts
items.summary: Inflation has risen for the eighth straight month in India, as food and energy prices rise due to the Iran war and deficient rainfall.

items.title: China consumer price growth weakens in June while producer inflation rises to near 4-year high
items.summary: Investors increasingly view China's two-speed growth with robust export and tepid domestic demand as a defining long-term feature of the Chinese economy.

items.title: Christine Lagarde leaves door open to early ECB exit, as she mulls French politics
items.summary: The European Central Bank's Christine Lagarde has declined to rule out an early end to her term as president, as she mulls a foray into French politics.

items.title: Europe wants to rebalance trade with Beijing, but can't quit Chinese air conditioners
items.summary: A historic heat wave has driven unprecedented demand for Chinese-made air conditioners in Europe, underscoring the tough task Brussels faces in rebalancing trade with Beijing.

items.title: World Cup could boost the June jobs report by 40,000, Goldman estimates
items.summary: Nonfarm payrolls are projected to post a gain of 115,000, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

items.title: Dallas Fed President Logan calls for 'modestly' higher interest rates
items.summary: The policymaker said this week's good inflation news wasn't good enough.

items.title: Short sellers load up against SpaceX as stock drops below IPO price
items.summary: About 185 million SpaceX shares are now sold short, representing roughly 29% of the company's publicly tradable float, according to S3.

items.title: Sen. Warren says Trump's CFPB overhaul has cost Americans $26.5 billion
items.summary: Sen. Elizabeth Warren says the Trump administration's rollback of CFPB rules and enforcement has cost Americans up to $26.5 billion so far.

items.title: What to watch for after Jensen Huang’s Japan visit
items.summary: Jensen Huang left Tokyo with deals spanning Japan's entire tech ecosystem.

items.title: New York governor says she’s using AI to analyze ‘every single rule’ in the state
items.summary: New York Governor Kathy Hochul might have just signed a moratorium on new AI data centers in the state, but she's not against using the technology herself. During an interview with Bloomberg's Odd Lots podcast, Hochul said that her team is using "AI to analyze every single rule, regulation, [and] policy" to check for outdated […]

items.title: Google is renaming NotebookLM to Gemini Notebook
items.summary: Google is giving its AI note-taking app a new name. The company announced on Thursday that NotebookLM is becoming Gemini Notebook, but will remain a standalone app even as it integrates more deeply across Gemini and Google Search. Google first revealed Gemini Notebook - then called Project Tailwind - in May 2023 before widely releasing […]

items.title: Claude can now use your 1Password credentials for you
items.summary: 1Password has launched a new browser integration for Claude that allows the Anthropic chatbot to access stored security credentials like usernames and passwords. The 1Password for Claude feature means that users can authorize Claude to complete multi-step tasks like booking travel and managing online accounts on their behalf without having to manually input their login […]

items.title: Google ordered to open Android and Search to rivals in Europe
items.summary: Google must give rival AI assistants and search engines greater access to key parts of Android and Google Search after the European Union ordered the company to comply with the bloc's digital antitrust rules. The two decisions, handed down Thursday, could weaken Google's control over two of the tech industry's most important platforms and have […]
